sentences.chinese: 前攻秦軍藍田南，又夜擊其北，秦軍大破，遂至咸陽，滅秦。
sentences.literal: He advanced attacking the Qin army south of Lantian, then at night attacked its north, the Qin army was greatly defeated, thus reaching Xianyang and destroying Qin.
When Xiang Yu arrived, he made the Duke of Pei King of Han.
The King of Han enfeoffed Cao Can as Marquis of Jiancheng.
He followed to Hanzhong, promoted to general.

sentences.chinese: 從還定三秦，初攻下辯、故道、雍、斄。
sentences.literal: He followed returning to pacify the Three Qins, initially attacking and capturing Bian, Gudao, Yong, and Lai.

sentences.chinese: 擊章平軍於好畤南，破之，圍好畤，取壤鄉。
sentences.literal: He attacked Zhang Ping's army south of Haozhi, defeated it, besieged Haozhi, and captured Rangxiang.

sentences.chinese: 擊三秦軍壤東及高櫟，破之。
sentences.literal: He attacked the Three Qins army east of Rang and at Gaoque, defeating it.

sentences.chinese: 復圍章平，章平出好畤走。
sentences.literal: He besieged Zhang Ping again, Zhang Ping fled from Haozhi.

sentences.chinese: 因擊趙賁、內史保軍，破之。
sentences.literal: He then attacked Zhao Ben and Grand Administrator Bao's army, defeating it.
He captured Xianyang to the east, renaming it New City.

sentences.chinese: 參將兵守景陵二十日，三秦使章平等攻參，參出擊，大破之。
sentences.literal: Cao Can led troops guarding Jingling for twenty days, the Three Qins sent Zhang Ping and others to attack Cao Can, Cao Can sallied to attack, greatly defeating them.
He was granted fief income in Ningqin.

sentences.chinese: 參以將軍引兵圍章邯於廢丘。
sentences.literal: Cao Can as general led troops besieging Zhang Han at Fei Qiu.

sentences.chinese: 以中尉從漢王出臨晉關。
sentences.literal: As Commandant he followed the King of Han out of Linjin Pass.

sentences.chinese: 至河內，下修武，渡圍津，東擊龍且、項他定陶，破之。
sentences.literal: Arriving in Hebei, he captured Xiuwu, crossed at Wei Jin, attacked Long Ju and Xiang Ta at Dingtao to the east, defeating them.
